entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange aggregator integrated with the Holdstation wallet, routing swaps across multiple liquidity sources for best-price execution and direct web and wallet trading.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Holdstation DEX Aggregator as a multichain DEX aggregator with best-price routing, low-fee execution, cross-chain support, direct website swapping, and Holdstation Wallet integration. The official swap application remains reachable.

evidence.title: What is Holdstation Dex
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Holdstation DEX Aggregator as a multichain decentralized exchange aggregator providing best-price routing across liquidity sources, cross-chain support, low fees, and direct wallet integration.

evidence.title: Holdstation DEX application
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap application endpoint remains reachable and is linked by the official Holdstation documentation as the website trading interface.

evidence.title: Holdstation Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Holdstation Swap across ZKsync Era and Berachain, corroborating the first-party multichain DEX aggregator identity.
